creator: andrew@house.key.net.au
text:
The previous port of poppassd worked fine under 2.1.x but broke under 2.2.x. Ron Bickers <rbickers@intercenter.net> sent me some changes which should allow it to work under 2.2.x and these changes are incorporated in this version. The port seems to still work under 2.1.x.

NOTE: I didnt do these 2.2.x changes and I havent a machine to test them on.

The new port is poppassd-2.2.tar.gz in incoming on ftp.freebsd.org.
